description: Springer Nature’s AdisInsight is a pharmaceutical intelligence product covering drug development, clinical trials, safety, regulatory milestones, and related life-sciences data. It is offered as a subscription service through web, API, and MCP access.
summary: Springer exposes AdisInsight developer surfaces: a subscription-gated HTTP API collection and a remote MCP server at `https://adisinsight-mcp.springer.com/mcp`, both tied to AdisInsight/Springer Nature credentials.
